view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement that 'Customer reviews and selects winner'.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement that 'Customer reviews and selects winner'.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement that 'Customer reviews and selects winner'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate that customers can review and select a winner from bids, but there is no concrete evidence provided that includes API reads or persisted state checks to confirm this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a homeowner reviews bids and selects a winner, it does not provide the necessary evidence to demonstrate that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of supporting evidence.
